hero.title: Empowering Freelancers, Connecting Businesses
hero.description: ALINA is more than a marketplace. We're a global community where talent meets opportunity, and businesses find the perfect freelancers to bring their visions to life.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: At ALINA, we believe in the power of human talent and the freedom of flexible work. Our mission is to create a thriving ecosystem where freelancers can showcase their skills and businesses can access top-tier talent from around the world.
mission.paragraph2: We're committed to building a platform that prioritizes trust, quality, and seamless collaboration. Every feature we develop, every policy we implement, is designed to make freelancing accessible, secure, and rewarding for everyone.
mission.paragraph3: Whether you're a creative designer, a skilled developer, a strategic marketer, or a business looking for expertise, ALINA is your partner in success.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.description: These principles guide everything we do at ALINA

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We maintain the highest standards for both freelancers and projects, ensuring exceptional results every time.

trust.title: Trust & Safety
trust.description: Your security is our priority. We've built robust systems to protect both clients and freelancers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously evolve our platform with cutting-edge features to enhance your experience.

global.title: Global Community
global.description: We celebrate diversity and foster connections across borders, cultures, and industries.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses and freelancers who trust ALINA for their success

howWeHelp.title: How We Help You Succeed
howWeHelp.description: Tailored solutions for everyone in our community

freelancers.title: For Freelancers
freelancers.description: Build your career on your terms. Get access to thousands of projects, set your own rates, and work with clients worldwide while we handle payments and security.

businesses.title: For Businesses
businesses.description: Find the perfect talent for any project. Browse verified professionals, compare proposals, and manage projects seamlessly with our intuitive platform.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: Every freelancer goes through our rigorous verification process. We ensure skill validation, portfolio review, and continuous performance monitoring for your peace of mind.

community.title: Vibrant Community
community.description: Join a supportive network of professionals. Access resources, share knowledge, get help when you need it, and grow together with fellow creators and entrepreneurs.

benefits.title: Why Choose ALINA
benefits.description: Experience the difference that sets us apart

verified.title: Verified Experts
verified.description: All freelancers undergo thorough verification to ensure authenticity and skill quality.

fast.title: Quick Turnaround
fast.description: Get matched with the right talent in minutes and start your project immediately.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our dedicated team is always here to help you succeed, day or night.

secure.title: Secure Payments
secure.description: Bank-level encryption and escrow protection for every transaction.
